title: ItemDisplayPlugin
description: This plugin allows the collection of items dropped within a 5-block radius in Minecraft, merging the items with the same type and displaying their quantity in the item’s custom name. Items that cannot be stacked, such as enchanted equipment (e.g., swords,
body: This plugin allows the collection of items dropped within a 5-block radius in Minecraft, merging the items with the same type and displaying their quantity in the item’s custom name. Items that cannot be stacked, such as enchanted equipment _(e.g., swords, armor)_, are excluded from merging to prevent loss of enchantments.
